reports.title: Graph Summary
reports.query: MATCH (n) RETURN labels(n)[0] AS Label, count(n) AS Count ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 20

reports.title: Relationship Types
reports.query: MATCH ()-[r]->() RETURN type(r) AS Relationship, count(r) AS Count ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 15

reports.title: Total Counts
reports.query: MATCH (n) WITH count(n) AS nodes MATCH ()-[r]->() WITH nodes, count(r) AS rels MATCH (n) WITH nodes, rels, size(collect(DISTINCT labels(n)[0])) AS labels RETURN nodes AS Nodes, rels AS Relationships, labels AS Labels

reports.title: Full Graph Explorer (click to expand)
reports.query: MATCH (n)-[r]-(m) RETURN n, r, m LIMIT 300

reports.title: All 20 OpSuite Errors → Fixes → AntiPatterns
reports.query: MATCH (e:Error)-[:FIXED_BY]->(f:Fix) WHERE e.id STARTS WITH 'ERR-OPSUITE-' OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:VIOLATES]->(ap:FlowAntiPattern) OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:IN_DOMAIN]->(fd:FeatureDomain) OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:FOR_STACK]->(s:Stack) RETURN e, f, ap, fd, s

reports.title: Error Timeline
reports.query: MATCH (e:Error) WHERE e.id STARTS WITH 'ERR-OPSUITE-' RETURN e.id AS Error, e.severity AS Severity, e.category AS Category, e.detectedAt AS Date, e.file AS File, substring(e.message, 0, 80) AS Message ORDER BY e.detectedAt, e.id

reports.title: Errors by Category
reports.query: MATCH (e:Error) WHERE e.id STARTS WITH 'ERR-OPSUITE-' RETURN e.category AS Category, count(e) AS Count ORDER BY Count DESC

reports.title: Domain → Specs → Rules Network
reports.query: MATCH (fd:FeatureDomain)<-[:IN_DOMAIN]-(n) RETURN fd, n LIMIT 500

reports.title: Specs per Domain
reports.query: MATCH (fs:FeatureSpec)-[:IN_DOMAIN]->(fd:FeatureDomain) RETURN fd.name AS Domain, count(fs) AS Specs ORDER BY Specs DESC

reports.title: Rules per Domain (wired via IN_DOMAIN)
reports.query: MATCH (r:Rule)-[:IN_DOMAIN]->(fd:FeatureDomain) RETURN fd.name AS Domain, count(r) AS Rules ORDER BY Rules DESC

reports.title: All Rules by Enforcement Level
reports.query: MATCH (r:Rule) RETURN r.enforcement AS Enforcement, count(r) AS Count ORDER BY Count DESC

reports.title: Rules by Category
reports.query: MATCH (r:Rule) RETURN r.category AS Category, count(r) AS Count ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 15

reports.title: BLOCK Rules (critical)
reports.query: MATCH (r:Rule) WHERE r.enforcement = 'BLOCK' RETURN r.name AS Rule, r.category AS Category, r.description AS Description, r.source AS Source ORDER BY r.category, r.name

reports.title: Security Tests Network
reports.query: MATCH (ct:CustomTest) OPTIONAL MATCH (ct)-[r]-(n) RETURN ct, r, n

reports.title: Flow Patterns → Stages → Transitions
reports.query: MATCH (fp:FlowPattern)-[:HAS_STAGE]->(fs:FlowStage) OPTIONAL MATCH (fs)-[:TRANSITIONS_TO]->(fs2:FlowStage) RETURN fp, fs, fs2 LIMIT 500

reports.title: Anti-Patterns (all)
reports.query: MATCH (ap:FlowAntiPattern) RETURN ap.name AS AntiPattern, ap.severity AS Severity, ap.category AS Category, substring(ap.description, 0, 100) AS Description ORDER BY ap.severity DESC, ap.name

reports.title: AppArchetypes Hub (everything connected to archetypes)
reports.query: MATCH (a:AppArchetype)<-[r:FOR_ARCHETYPE]-(n) WITH a, labels(n)[0] AS nodeType, count(n) AS count RETURN a.name AS Archetype, nodeType AS ConnectedType, count ORDER BY a.name, count DESC

reports.title: Stack Usage
reports.query: MATCH (s:Stack)<-[r]-(n) RETURN s.name AS Stack, count(n) AS Connections ORDER BY Connections DESC LIMIT 20

reports.title: FeatureType → Required Domains Map
reports.query: MATCH (ft:FeatureType)-[:REQUIRES_DOMAIN]->(fd:FeatureDomain) RETURN ft, fd

reports.title: Knowledge by Category
reports.query: MATCH (k:Knowledge) RETURN k.category AS Category, count(k) AS Count, avg(k.confidence) AS AvgConfidence ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 15

reports.title: Knowledge Sources (Perplexity Findings)
reports.query: MATCH (pf:PerplexityFinding) RETURN pf.category AS Category, count(pf) AS Findings ORDER BY Findings DESC LIMIT 10

reports.title: Knowledge → INFORMS Network (sample)
reports.query: MATCH (k:Knowledge)-[:INFORMS]->(target) RETURN k, target LIMIT 200

reports.title: Your Error History (personal graph)
reports.query: MATCH (u:User {name: 'sunday'})-[r]-(n) OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r2]-(m) WHERE NOT m:User RETURN u, r, n, r2, m LIMIT 300

reports.title: Your Errors by Severity
reports.query: MATCH (u:User {name: 'sunday'})-[:ENCOUNTERED]->(e:Error) RETURN e.severity AS Severity, count(e) AS Count

reports.title: Your Fix Timeline
reports.query: MATCH (u:User {name: 'sunday'})-[:APPLIED_FIX]->(f:Fix) RETURN f.id AS Fix, f.date AS Date, substring(f.action, 0, 100) AS Action ORDER BY f.date
